title: Floral Crispy Indian Vegetable Spring-Rolls
description: A nostalgic, floral twist on classic Indian egg rolls, packed with crisp veggies, fragrant herbs, and a sweet mango pickle dip.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine sliced cabbage, carrot, bell pepper, cilantro, and rose petals.
Season the mixture with cumin, coriander, turmeric, and salt; toss until evenly coated.
Heat 1–2 cups of oil in a deep pan to 180 °C (350 °F). While the oil warms, lay an egg roll wrapper on a clean surface with one corner pointing toward you.
Place about 2–3 tablespoons of the vegetable mixture near the corner that will fold over, pressing a small amount of mango pickle into the center for flavor.
Fold the corner over the filling, then fold in the side edges, rolling tightly to seal the edge with a light dusting of flour or a dab of water.
Repeat with remaining wrappers and filling until all are rolled.
Carefully lower each roll into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 2–3 minutes, turning once.
Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the rolls warm with extra mango pickle or a simple vegan yogurt dip if desired (omit for strict vegan).
